---
title: "mcp-lightcast"
date: '2025-08-22'
categories: [project, AI, MCP, tools]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/mcp-lightcast"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/mcp-lightcast"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/mcp-lightcast"
stars: 2
project_lang: "Python"
---

An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for the Lightcast API, enabling AI assistants to query labor market data, job postings, and skills data directly.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/mcp-lightcast)
